OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Quidachay; Clerk: : B PAREDES; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo for the plaintiff.
Defendant Micah Kemp is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ELAN LAMBERT, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of FEB-10-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
